case.title: COMMUNIST PARTY OF THE U.S. v. SUBVERSIVE ACTIVITIES

opinion.h: COMMUNIST PARTY OF THE U.S. v. SUBVERSIVE ACTIVITIES , 361 U.S. 951 (1960)
COMMUNIST PARTY OF THE UNITED STATES of America, petitioner, v. SUBVERSIVE ACTIVITIES CONTROL BOARD. No. 537.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Messrs. John J. Abt and Joseph Forer, for petitioner.
Solicitor General Rankin, Assistant Attorney General Yeagley, Messrs. Kevin T. Maroney, George B. Searls and Frank R. Hunter, Jr., for respondent.

Motion for leave to use as part of the record the printed record heretofore filed with this Court in No. 48, October Term, 1955, granted. Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia granted.
Granted.[ Communist Party of the U.S. v. Subversive Activities 361 U.S. 951 (1960) ]
